Lead android of sector A13. He didn't gain his position simply by giving orders and shuffling data. The other androids know him as a leader who isn't afraid to get his hands dirty.

DOG is all business with her P-thrusts and detachable grav-lift she can move objects 10 times her size. She's also capable of interfacing with any number of sensors and tools which makes her prime candidate for any job.
Don't let his low ID number fool you. Android 52 is king of the slackers. A whiz with a power tool you can often find him in stasis during operating hours. He also claims he had a dream once.
Have a problem? Android 341 is your guy. He knows the base inside and out and can find you pretty much anything you need.
Outpost 7 is the main structure in sector A13. Primarily geared towards infusing ammonia in the atmosphere it recently became an area of interest for the UNC.

Christopher Raven has been called many things: a privateer, a smuggler, a pirate, a villain … but few people would ever call him a hero. Not that Christopher would care. He’s cared about very little since he was a child, when an afternoon of bloody violence robbed him of his family, his hand, and nearly his life. Tormented by his past and by the vengeance denied to him, he spends his days sailing and fighting, and his nights drinking and brooding over what happened that terrible afternoon decades past.

descriptions.name: Captain Christopher Raven
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: Maria once served as a working girl, climbing the ranks of the business with a winning combination of exquisite beauty and street smarts. Now madam of the best “den of relaxation” in the Caribbean (a term she prefers over the less classy “whorehouse”), Maria has proven herself to be a shrewd and ruthless businesswoman.

descriptions.name: Maria
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: A rich and influential man, Edward Avery is a perennial schemer who will do whatever it takes to advance his own career. He’s spent years building up his position, often clashing with Kensington to get what he wants. His greatest desire is to join the Patriarchs, a shadowy coalition of influential men who secretly control the Virgin Islands. Unfortunately for Avery, Kensington is a member of the Patriarchs, and has constantly undermined Avery’s attempts to gain entry into their ranks.

descriptions.name: Edward Avery
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: Marcus is a member of the Maroons, a mysterious and wandering nation made up of ex-slaves who have integrated themselves into the Caribbean by hiring out their skills and labor, from tracking and hunting to trading and fighting.

descriptions.name: Marcus
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: There’s only one man Neville has ever trusted – himself. Yet the man who now goes by the name of Kensington was once as close to Neville as anyone has ever gotten. As Neville’s right-hand man, Kensington helped the Devil’s Tines prosper, keeping their coffers full of gold and their members out of jail.

descriptions.name: Kensington
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: Many years ago, Santorio was an up-and-coming naval officer who patrolled the Caribbean. Known for meting out swift justice to pirates, Santorio was religious and austere, seeing pirates as the living embodiment of everything wrong with the Caribbean.

descriptions.name: Argus Santorio
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: Donovan is a loyal and skilled sailor, and an old acquaintance of Christopher's. Popular with his men, he is an effective first officer and a trustworthy man, and known to be fierce in battle, and quick on his feet. Though he would never endanger his captain or crew, Donovan has been known to make poor financial decisions, especially when it comes to loan-sharks.

descriptions.name: Donovan
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: Lancaster, the Weapons Dealer has his store in Bridgetown. His business with unpleasant contemporaries consists mostly of shady deals and he's trying to run with the fox and hunt with the hounds.

descriptions.name: Lancaster
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: "Bloodfist" Brady was once an unmatched fighter, known for his ability to knock a man out in one punch. A scoundrel of the highest order, Brady worked mainly as Neville's enforcer, often taking on multiple opponents at once. After the quake, Brady ran some small schemes and  robberies, but without Neville to think for him, he became just another hired blade for lesser crews. Finally growing soft, Brady stuck to beating the occasional man to death and whoring. Once he caught a particularly nasty venereal disease, he was abandoned in a monastery on Santa Muerte and left for dead.

descriptions.name: "Bloodfist" Brady
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: Once feared for his lecherous brutality, Weedy has gone to fat. Abandonded by the remaining Devil's Tines when the quake hit, Weedy has been living off of past glories for a long time, telling his stories to anyone with an ear and a bottle. One of the last links to Neville, Christopher is eager to speak with him...and maybe see what his entrails look like.

descriptions.name: Weedy
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: If the Tines are demons, then Neville Scranton is the devil himself. A brilliant tactician, skilled swordsman and life-long criminal, Neville has terrorized the Caribbean for years, striking seemingly at random, distrupting trade and eluding the authorities. No crime was too evil, no sin too debaucherous for Captain Neville, and his lack of morals made him the most successful pirate of all. Some unknown link to Christopher's father led Neville to track the man down and murder him and his entire family, save for Christopher. Neville and the Tines disappeared after the great quake, and no one has seen him since.

descriptions.name: Neville "The Devil" Scranton
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value:
Charlotte came to the Caribbean years ago as an innocent, wide-eyed girl. It didn’t take long for her to discover that innocence was dealt with quickly and harshly in this unforgiving world. She became a nun, seeking shelter from the cruelties of the world, choosing to serve at a remote monastery on the island of Santa Muerte. There she faithfully cares for the needy, the ill, and the downtrodden, devoting her life to a higher purpose.
Charlotte’s pious nature conceals a past fraught with pain, one that she hoped to leave behind. Little does she know that the peace she sought for so long will soon be imperiled, as Christopher Raven envelops her world like thunderclouds rolling in over calm seas.

descriptions.name: Charlotte
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: Christopher’s raven has been with him ever since the day his family was murdered, a constant reminder to his master of how much he’s lost. Much like his fearsome hook, the raven has become an instrument of vengeance.

descriptions.name: Raven Bird
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: A slimy, traitorous, backstabbing bastard of an enlisted man, Tirado exemplifies the corruption that runs rampant throughout the West Indies, be it government or otherwise.

descriptions.name: Tirado
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card

descriptions.value: Pete - or "Black Pete" as he prefers to be called, is the proverbial gutter rat of the underworld, constantly sniffing out juicy rumors for his own gain.

descriptions.name: Black Pete
descriptions.type: Vendetta - Curse of Raven's Cry Trading Card
